context: Tests whether the agent uses `needs` for DAG optimization to decouple frontend and backend job chains, sets `timeout` on jobs, configures `retry` for flaky operations, and marks test/build jobs as `interruptible: true`.

checklist.name: needs used for DAG
checklist.description: At least one test or downstream job uses a `needs:` list that references only its own component's build job (not all build jobs)

checklist.name: Frontend and backend chains decoupled
checklist.description: Frontend test/deploy jobs reference frontend build in `needs:`, and backend test/deploy jobs reference backend build in `needs:` — not cross-component

checklist.name: timeout on jobs
checklist.description: At least two jobs (or the default block) include a `timeout:` field with a value in minutes

checklist.name: retry configured
checklist.description: At least one job (or the default block) includes a `retry:` configuration

checklist.name: interruptible: true on build/test jobs
checklist.description: At least one build or test job has `interruptible: true` (or it is set in the `default:` block)

checklist.name: Image pinned
checklist.description: All `image:` values specify a version other than `:latest`

checklist.name: No only/except
checklist.description: The YAML does NOT use `only:` or `except:` keywords

checklist.name: Stages declared
checklist.description: A `stages:` key is present listing the pipeline stages
